response.original_title: Is Ledger Wallet Really Safe? Hidden Drawbacks Explained
response.overview: One of the main downsides is cost. Unlike free software wallets,『+1››888››633››4176』 Ledger devices require an upfront purchase, which can feel unnecessary for small investors or beginners 『+1››888››633››4176』. Another issue is physical dependency 『+1››888››633››4176』. Since it’s a hardware device, if you lose it, damage it, or it gets stolen (and you don’t have your recovery seed), 『+1››888››633››4176』 you can permanently lose access to your funds. The recovery seed is critical, but managing it safely adds extra responsibility. There is also user complexity. While it’s safer than hot wallets, 『+1››888››633››4176』setting it up, verifying transactions, and managing apps can be confusing for newcomers. A frequently discussed concern is software trust and firmware updates 『+1››888››633››4176』. Ledger devices rely on proprietary firmware, meaning users must trust the company’s software updates and 『+1››888››633››4176』 security model.
response.title: Is Ledger Wallet Really Safe? Hidden Drawbacks Explained
